title: NOIR: Autonomous Multimodal Robot Assistant
description: A mobile robot running three concurrent real-time loops (vision, voice, hardware control) in Python, with a fully local voice pipeline: openWakeWord hotword, Faster-Whisper STT on CUDA, Gemma via Ollama, and Piper TTS. ESP32 firmware on FreeRTOS drives an L298N H-bridge over TCP, with a Flutter app for live telemetry and manual control.
